title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective commentary marking the 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo's victory over Lee Sedol in 2016, framed as the catalyst for the modern AI revolution. The video discusses how the match's significance rippled across algorithmic discovery and scientific applications like protein folding, featuring perspectives from DeepMind researchers Pushmeet Kohli and Thore Graepel.
